changes: npm activity connected — newly published packages and versions now show up in the feed automatically, grouped by package with a color-coded version badge.
SoundCloud activity connected — uploaded and liked tracks now show up in the feed automatically.
GitHub activity now covers more actions — forked repositories, opened and closed issues, and opened, merged, and closed pull requests all appear in the feed.
Site is now available at eccs.dev.
Feed page now loads noticeably faster — all renderers and analytics now start in parallel instead of one after another.
Telegram photos are now clickable — tap or click any photo to open the full-size image directly.
New platforms added to the site now automatically appear in your feed turned on, even if you previously customized which sources to show.
Added a "What's new" button in the top-right corner so you can re-read past updates at any time.
Telegram media is now cached on the proxy server and served instantly on repeat visits.
Only one video or audio track can play at a time — starting a new one automatically pauses the previous.
Carousel navigation buttons now hide when you are at the first or last slide instead of remaining visible and unclickable.
Changelog introduced — version updates will now appear here on every new visit after an update.
Telegram videos can now be seeked to any position — the media proxy supports partial content requests.
